data.headline: Home Remodeling in Connecticut
data.subheadline: We remodel kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and more for homeowners across Fairfield and New Haven Counties, Connecticut. We communicate clearly, show up when we say we will, and finish the job. That's what sets us apart, and why most of our clients never need to look for a contractor again.
data.eyebrow: CT HOME REMODELING , FAIRFIELD & NEW HAVEN COUNTIES
data.supporting_line: On-site or remote consultation via Google Meet. Complimentary and without obligation.

data.title: Why Homeowners Choose BuiltWell CT
data.content:
Remodeling has a reputation problem. Contractors who disappear, timelines that stretch from weeks into months, phone calls that go unanswered. Most homeowners have a story. We built BuiltWell CT around three commitments that address those problems directly.

H3: We Communicate
You'll know what's happening on your project every day. Before we start, you receive a written proposal that spells out exactly what's included, the timeline, and the cost.

Once construction begins, you get daily updates so you're never left wondering. If something changes, we tell you immediately instead of waiting until you notice.

H3: We Show Up
We keep the schedule we commit to. Our crews arrive on time, work a full day, and clean the job site before they leave each evening. You shouldn't have to live in a construction zone.

No tools scattered, no materials piled in your hallway, no dust on surfaces that should be protected. A clean site is part of the job, not an afterthought.

H3: We Finish What We Start
Projects end. Punch lists get completed. Walk-throughs happen on schedule. We don't consider a job done until you've walked through it with us and told us it's right.

If something isn't what you expected, we fix it before we close out. That's why our clients refer us to family and friends, and call us again for their next project.

data.title: Home Remodeling Services
data.content:
We handle the full range of interior home remodeling, from individual rooms to whole-home renovations. Whether you're replacing a dated kitchen, finishing an unused basement, or adding square footage with a home addition, we bring the same standard of work and communication to every project.

--- PRIMARY SERVICES ---

H3: Kitchen Remodeling
The kitchen is the most-used room in your home, and a full remodel touches everything: cabinets, countertops, layout, plumbing, lighting, and flooring. We plan every kitchen project in detail before a single wall opens, so you know exactly what's happening and when. Learn more about our kitchen remodeling services.

H3: Bathroom Remodeling
From a single bathroom refresh to a complete primary suite overhaul, we handle tile, fixtures, vanities, shower systems, and all the finish work that makes the difference between a bathroom that looks fine and one that holds up for decades. Learn more about our bathroom remodeling services.

H3: Basement Finishing
An unfinished basement is usable square footage you're not using. We turn it into living space: a family room, home office, guest suite, gym, or anything in between, properly framed, insulated, drywalled, lit, and finished to match the rest of your home. Learn more about our basement finishing services.

H3: Home Additions
When you've outgrown your current floor plan, an addition gives you the space you need without giving up the neighborhood you chose. We manage the full scope: design coordination, permits, foundation, framing, and all interior and exterior finish work. Learn more about our home addition services.

--- SECONDARY SERVICES ---

H3: Flooring Installation
We install hardwood, engineered wood, luxury vinyl plank, and tile throughout your home. New flooring is one of the highest-impact changes you can make, and we install it right the first time so it lasts. Learn more about our flooring installation services.

H3: Interior Painting
A clean, well-applied coat of paint changes how every room feels. We prep surfaces properly, protect your furniture and trim, and deliver clean lines and consistent coverage throughout. Learn more about our interior painting services.

H3: Interior Carpentry
Crown molding, built-in shelving, wainscoting, coffered ceilings, and custom trim work are where craftsmanship shows. We take on the detail work that makes a finished space look intentional. Learn more about our interior carpentry services.

H3: Attic Conversions
If your attic has enough headroom, it can become a bedroom, office, or bonus room. We assess the structural requirements, handle insulation and HVAC extensions, and convert unused overhead space into a finished room with full permits. Learn more about our attic conversion services.

H3: Decks and Porches
Outdoor living space adds real value, and it requires real craftsmanship to hold up through Connecticut winters. We build decks and porches to last, using materials appropriate for the exposure and construction methods that meet local code. Learn more about our deck and porch services.

H3: Design and Planning
Not every homeowner comes in with a finished design. We offer structured planning and design guidance to help you clarify scope, finalize selections, and move into construction with a plan that reflects what you actually want. Learn more about our design and planning services.

H3: Comfort and Accessibility Remodeling
We install grab bars, wider doorways, walk-in showers, step-free transitions, and other modifications that make your home more comfortable and more functional at any stage of life. These projects are built to the same standard as any other remodel we do. Learn more about our comfort and accessibility remodeling services.

View all our services.

data.title: Our Remodeling Process
data.subtitle: We follow the same five-step process on every project, whether it's a single bathroom or a whole-home renovation. It keeps projects on schedule and keeps you informed at every stage.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: We visit your home or connect via Google Meet or Zoom at no charge and with no obligation, so we can understand the scope before we put anything in writing.

steps.title: Planning
steps.description: You receive a written proposal with a clear breakdown of exactly what's included, the full project timeline, and the cost. No vague ranges, no surprises later.

steps.title: Selections
steps.description: We guide you through every material choice and communicate lead times upfront, so nothing delays construction once the schedule is set.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Construction begins on the agreed start date. Crews show up on time, daily updates are sent, and the job site is cleaned every evening.

steps.title: Walkthrough
steps.description: When the work is finished, we walk through the project together. Nothing is signed off until you're satisfied with every detail.

data.title: Where We Work
data.content:
We serve homeowners throughout Fairfield County and New Haven County, Connecticut. If your town isn't listed below, contact us, as we may still be able to help. See all areas we serve.

H3: Fairfield County
We serve Greenwich, Stamford, Norwalk, Westport, Darien, New Canaan, Fairfield, and Wilton, along with the surrounding communities throughout the county. Learn more about our work in Fairfield County.

H3: New Haven County
We serve New Haven, Milford, West Haven, Hamden, Orange, Derby, Shelton, and Woodbridge, along with the surrounding communities throughout the county. Learn more about our work in New Haven County.

data.title: Licensed and Insured in Connecticut
data.content:
We hold CT Home Improvement Contractor License #0668405, issued by the State of Connecticut Department of Consumer Protection. We carry general liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage on every project.

What that means for you: if something goes wrong on your property during construction, you're protected. You're not left dealing with an uninsured contractor and a coverage dispute. We work with licensed, insured subcontractors when specialty trades are involved, and we carry the documentation to prove it.
